allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('vjezbe.html', 'utf8'\); const m = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(!m\) { console.log\('no script'\); process.exit\(1\); } try { new Function\(m[1]\); console.log\('JS OK — ' + m[1].split\(/\\r?\\n/\).length + ' lines'\); } catch \(e\) { console.error\('JS syntax error:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const p of ['vokabular.html','A1/vjezbe.html']\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)||[];let i=0;for\(const block of m\){const code=block.replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\);try{new Function\(code\);console.log\(p+' script#'+\(++i\)+' OK \('+code.length+' chars\)'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(p+' script#'+\(++i\)+' FAIL: '+e.message\);}}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const p of ['A1/gradivo.html','brzi-pregled.html']\){const html=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const open=\(html.match\(/<div class=\\"lesson\\"/g\)||[]\).length;const closeDiv=\(html.match\(/<\\/div><!-- \\/lesson -->/g\)||[]\).length;const lb=\(html.match\(/<div class=\\"lesson-body\\">/g\)||[]\).length;const lbc=\(html.match\(/<\\/div><!-- \\/lesson-body -->/g\)||[]\).length;const subs=\(html.match\(/<div class=\\"sub-section\\"/g\)||[]\).length;const totalOpen=\(html.match\(/<div\\b/g\)||[]\).length;const totalClose=\(html.match\(/<\\/div>/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\(p,'| lesson:',open,'/lesson:',closeDiv,'| lesson-body:',lb,'/lesson-body:',lbc,'| sub-section:',subs,'| div balance: open',totalOpen,'close',totalClose,'diff',totalOpen-totalClose\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const p of ['A1/gradivo.html','brzi-pregled.html']\){const h=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const links=[...h.matchAll\(/href=\\"#\([^\\"]+\)\\"/g\)].map\(m=>m[1]\);const ids=[...h.matchAll\(/id=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"/g\)].map\(m=>m[1]\);const missing=links.filter\(l=>!ids.includes\(l\)\);console.log\(p,'| links:',links.length,'| ids:',ids.length,'| missing:',missing.length===0?'NONE':missing.join\(', '\)\);}")
